privacyCommitment.title: Privacy Commitment
privacyCommitment.description: BookStore is committed to protecting your personal information. We comply with data protection laws and use advanced security technologies.

subsection1.title: 1.1. Information You Provide
items: Account info: Name, email, phone number, password
Payment info: Payment method (card details not stored)

subsection2.title: 1.2. Automatically Collected Information
items: Device info: IP, browser, operating system
Usage data: View history, search, purchases

subsection3.title: 1.3. Third-Party Information
items: Login via Google, Facebook (name, email, avatar)

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.description: We only share your information with:

subsection2.title: 3.2. Legal Requirements
subsection2.description: When required by authorities or to protect the legal rights of BookStore and users.

subsection3.title: 3.3. Business Transfer
subsection3.description: In case of merger, acquisition or asset transfer, your information may be transferred.

importantNote.text: BookStore DOES NOT sell or rent your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

section4.title: 4. Information Security
section4.description: We apply security measures to protect your information:
items: SSL/TLS encryption for all data transmission

importantWarning.text: No system is 100% secure. Please keep your login credentials secure and do not share with others.

section5.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section5.description: BookStore uses cookies and similar technologies to:

subsection2.title: 5.2. Managing Cookies
subsection2.description: You can manage cookies through browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect user experience.

section6.title: 6. Your Rights
section6.description: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
items: Right to access: View personal information we store
Right to delete: Request deletion of personal information
Right to restrict: Limit how information is used
Right to portability: Export data to another format
Right to object: Refuse data processing in certain cases
Right to withdraw: Withdraw consent at any time
section6.contactToExercise: To exercise these rights, please contact: support@bookstore.vn

section7.title: 7. Data Retention
section7.description: We retain your information for as long as necessary to:
section7.afterDeletion: After account deletion, some information may be retained in backups for up to 90 days.

section8.title: 8. Children
section8.description: BookStore does not knowingly collect information from children under 16. If you are a parent/guardian and discover your child has provided information, please contact us to delete the data.

section9.title: 9. Marketing Communications
section9.description: You may receive marketing communications from BookStore via email, SMS or push notifications about:

unsubscribe.text: You can unsubscribe at any time by clicking the "Unsubscribe" link in emails or updating in Account Settings.

section10.title: 10. Policy Changes
section10.description: BookStore reserves the right to update this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in practices or legal requirements.
section10.notification: We will notify you of significant changes via:
section10.continuedUse: The "Last updated" date at the top will change when updated. Continued use after changes means you accept the new policy.

section11.title: 11. Contact Us
section11.description: If you have any questions, concerns or requests about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your personal data, please contact:
section11.responseTime: We commit to responding to all requests within 30 business days.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.importantNoticeDesc: By using BookStore services, you agree to comply with these terms. Please read carefully before using.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.intro: Welcome to BookStore - online book trading platform. These terms of service govern your use of our website and services.
section1.companyInfo: BookStore is operated by BookStore Vietnam Co., Ltd., headquartered in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.

sub1.title: 2.1. Account Registration
items: You must be 16 years or older to register
Registration information must be accurate and complete
You are responsible for securing your login credentials
Each person is allowed only one account

sub2.title: 2.2. Account Usage
items: Do not share account with others
Report immediately if unauthorized access is detected
BookStore reserves the right to suspend violating accounts

sub1.title: 3.1. Orders
items: Check book information carefully before ordering
Prices and availability may change without notice
Orders are confirmed via email after successful placement

sub2.title: 3.2. Payment
items: Payment methods: COD, Bank Transfer, E-wallets
Payment must be completed within 24 hours
BookStore does not store payment card information

section4.title: 4. Shipping and Delivery
items: Shipping fee based on area and weight
Free shipping for orders over 200,000 VND
Contact immediately if goods are damaged upon receipt

section6.title: 6. Intellectual Property
section6.desc: All content on BookStore (text, images, logos, design) is owned by BookStore or authorized partners.
items: Do not copy, modify, distribute content without permission
Do not use BookStore logo, brand for commercial purposes
Violations will be handled according to law

section7.title: 7. Prohibited Conduct
section7.intro: Users are not allowed to engage in the following:

section8.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
items: Indirect, incidental damages from service use
Technical issues, service interruptions beyond control

section9.title: 9. Changes to Terms
section9.desc1: BookStore reserves the right to update these terms at any time. Important changes will be notified via email or on the website.
section9.desc2: Continued use of services after changes means you accept the new terms.

section10.title: 10. Contact
section10.intro: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact:
